Search Results for

    Namespace

    Classes

    AiUnit

    Class for a moving unit controlled by NavMeshAgent. Inherits Unit. Authors: Eveliina Pylkkänen, Olga Ivanova, Jenna Virolainen

    ApplicationController

    Class for controlling game initialisation, unit creation, undo actions, and shared game state. Authors: Eveliina Pylkkänen, Olga Ivanova, Jenna Virolainen

    BuildingUnit

    Class for a basic building unit. Inherits Unit. Authors: Eveliina Pylkkänen, Olga Ivanova, Jenna Virolainen

    CameraController

    Class to handle camera movement and interactions. Authors: Eveliina Pylkkänen, Olga Ivanova, Jenna Virolainen

    InputController

    Class for handling user input. Authors: Eveliina Pylkkänen, Olga Ivanova, Jenna Virolainen

    NewUnitButton

    Nappi uuden yksikön luomiseen. Author Jenna Virolainen.

    ReactiveObserver<T>

    ReactiveProperty<T>

    Observable arvo, joka ilmoittaa muutoksista. Author Jenna Virolainen.

    SingletonMono<T>

    Varmistaa että T :stä on vain yksi instanssi ja luo sen jos sitä ei ole. Author Jenna Virolainen.

    Singleton<T>

    Singleton toteutus pitää huolen, että luokasta on vain yksi instanssi. Author Jenna Virolainen.

    UIButton

    Base class for all UI buttons. Authors: Eveliina Pylkkänen, Olga Ivanova, Jenna Virolainen

    UIController

    Class for handling the game UI. Authors: Eveliina Pylkkänen, Olga Ivanova, Jenna Virolainen

    Unit

    Abstract class for the game's units that are placed on the level. Authors: Eveliina Pylkkänen, Olga Ivanova, Jenna Virolainen

    UnitBuildCommand

    Command for building a unit. Authors: Ivanova Olga, Pylkkänen Eveliina, Virolainen Jenna

    UnitController

    Class for managing unit deployment, selection, and movement commands. Authors: Eveliina Pylkkänen, Olga Ivanova, Jenna Virolainen

    UnitFactory<UnitT>

    Factory class for creating unit instances. Authors: Ivanova Olga, Pylkkänen Eveliina, Virolainen Jenna

    UnitSpecsSO

    ScriptableObject that stores the stats and materials for a unit. Authors: Eveliina Pylkkänen, Olga Ivanova, Jenna Virolainen

    Interfaces

    ICommand

    This is an interface for command design pattern. Authors: Ivanova Olga, Pylkkänen Eveliina, Virolainen Jenn

    IObserver<T>

    Interface for an observer that receives updates from a subject. Authors: Ivanova Olga, Pylkkänen Eveliina, Virolainen Jenna

    ISubject<T>

    Interface for a subject that maintains a list of observers and notifies them about changes. Authors: Ivanova Olga, Pylkkänen Eveliina, Virolainen Jenna

    NewUnitButton.UnitType

    Määrittää yksikön tyypin.
